paper_metadata.title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
paper_metadata.abstract: By decomposing the image formation process into a sequential application of denoising autoencoders, diffusion models (DMs) achieve state-of-the-art synthesis results on image data and beyond. Additionally, their formulation allows for a guiding mechanism to control the image generation process without retraining. However, since these models typically operate directly in pixel space, optimization of powerful DMs often consumes hundreds of GPU days and inference is expensive due to sequential evaluations. To enable DM training on limited computational resources while retaining their quality and flexibility, we apply them in the latent space of powerful pretrained autoencoders. In contrast to previous work, training diffusion models on such a representation allows for the first time to reach a near-optimal point between complexity reduction and detail preservation, greatly boosting visual fidelity. By introducing cross-attention layers into the model architecture, we turn diffusion models into powerful and flexible generators for general conditioning inputs such as text or bounding boxes and high-resolution synthesis becomes possible in a convolutional manner. Our latent diffusion models (LDMs) achieve a new state of the art for image inpainting and highly competitive performance on various tasks, including unconditional image generation, semantic scene synthesis, and super-resolution, while significantly reducing computational requirements compared to pixel-based DMs. Code is available at https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion .

extraction_data.innovation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) introduce a perceptual compression model (encoder-decoder) to map images into a lower-dimensional latent space, enabling efficient high-resolution image synthesis by applying diffusion models in this latent space rather than pixel space. This reduces computational complexity while preserving perceptual quality.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Variant of LDM with a different downsampling factor (f=4) for the latent space, balancing perceptual compression and computational efficiency for high-resolution image synthesis.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDMs introduce a two-stage approach: first, an autoencoder compresses images into a lower-dimensional latent space; second, a diffusion model is trained in this latent space, reducing computational requirements while maintaining high-quality synthesis. This enables efficient high-resolution image generation and conditional synthesis across diverse tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: CelebA-HQ, FFHQ, LSUN-Churches, LSUN-Bedrooms, ImageNet, LAION-400M
extraction_data.extension: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) combine an autoencoding model with a diffusion model operating in latent space, significantly improving training and sampling efficiency without degrading quality. The cross-attention conditioning mechanism enables versatile conditional image synthesis tasks without task-specific architectures.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient computational resources
extraction_data.application: Unconditional image generation, class-conditional image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic synthesis, super-resolution, inpainting
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) operate in the latent space of pretrained autoencoders, significantly reducing computational requirements while maintaining high-quality image synthesis. This approach enables efficient scaling and high-resolution image generation.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: LAION-400M, OpenImages, ImageNet, FFHQ, LSUN, CelebA-HQ
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient computational resources
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Variant of LDM with a downsampling factor (f=16), demonstrating that overly large downsampling factors can lead to information loss and reduced image fidelity, limiting the achievable quality of synthesis.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: LAION-400M, OpenImages, ImageNet, FFHQ, LSUN, CelebA-HQ
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with efficient computational resources
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Variant of LDM that imposes a slight KL-penalty towards a standard normal distribution on the learned latent space, similar to a VAE, to avoid arbitrarily high-variance latent spaces while preserving reconstruction quality.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space with KL regularization
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Variant of LDM that uses vector quantization (VQ) within the decoder to regularize the latent space, achieving better sample quality despite slightly lower reconstruction capabilities compared to KL-regularized models.
extraction_data.application: Image generation, text-to-image synthesis, semantic map-based image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising diffusion process in latent space with vector quantization (VQ) regularization
extraction_data.extension: Uses a cross-attention mechanism to condition the diffusion process on inputs like text prompts or semantic maps, enabling flexible and controllable image synthesis.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDM-4 with classifier-free guidance (c.f.g) for improved class-conditional image generation, achieving state-of-the-art FID and IS scores on ImageNet.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based generative modeling with classifier-free guidance
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Class-conditional image generation, layout-to-image synthesis, super-resolution
extraction_data.extension: Classifier-free guidance for improved sample quality and diversity in conditional image generation.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDM-8 with classifier-free guidance (c.f.g) for improved text-to-image synthesis, achieving competitive FID and IS scores on MS-COCO with significantly fewer parameters than prior work.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Diffusion-based generative modeling with classifier-free guidance
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Class-conditional image generation with classifier guidance
extraction_data.extension: Classifier-free guidance for improved sample quality and alignment with text prompts in text-to-image synthesis.
extraction_data.application: Class-conditional image generation, high-quality image synthesis
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) with a downsampling factor of 32, demonstrating the limits of perceptual compression on sample quality.
extraction_data.application: Unconditional image generation, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A variant of LDM using KL-regularized latent spaces, enabling efficient high-resolution image synthesis with rescaling of the latent space to adjust the signal-to-noise ratio for improved convolutional sampling.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: LAION, ImageNet, and other large-scale image datasets
extraction_data.application: Class-conditional image generation, semantic image synthesis
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.extension: Latent space rescaling to control the signal-to-noise ratio during convolutional sampling for improved global coherence in generated images.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: A variant of LDM using VQ-regularized latent spaces, which naturally have a variance close to 1, eliminating the need for latent space rescaling and simplifying the training process.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: LAION, ImageNet, and other large-scale image datasets
extraction_data.application: Semantic image synthesis, class-conditional image generation
extraction_data.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with diffusion models
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: LDM-BSR generalizes super-resolution to arbitrary real-world images by replacing bicubic downsampling with a diverse degradation pipeline, enabling robust upsampling of images with complex artifacts.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Diverse image degradation datasets (e.g., BSR-degradation pipeline)
extraction_data.application: Image upsampling, super-resolution for diverse real-world inputs
extraction_data.extension: BSR-degradation pipeline incorporating JPEG compression noise, camera sensor noise, interpolation artifacts, Gaussian blur, and Gaussian noise in random order.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: VQGAN serves as the first-stage autoencoding model for LDMs, enabling efficient latent space representation through vector quantization and adversarial training.
extraction_data.application: Latent space representation for diffusion models, image reconstruction
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient and high-fidelity image representation for latent diffusion
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Vector Quantized Generative Adversarial Network (VQGAN) training
extraction_data.extension: Vector quantization (VQ) regularization for discrete latent space representation, enabling high-fidelity reconstruction and efficient latent diffusion.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: VQGAN-f-4 is an autoencoder model with vector quantization, serving as the first-stage model for LDM, enabling efficient latent space representation for high-resolution image synthesis.
extraction_data.application: First-stage model for latent diffusion models (image compression)
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient latent space representation for high-resolution image synthesis
extraction_data.extension: Vector-quantized latent space for high-fidelity image reconstruction.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

extraction_data.innovation: VQGAN-f-8 is a larger variant of VQGAN-f-4 with increased compression rate, serving as the first-stage model for LDM with higher latent space dimensionality reduction.
extraction_data.application: First-stage model for latent diffusion models (image compression)
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient latent space representation for high-resolution image synthesis
extraction_data.extension: Higher compression rate with vector-quantized latent space for improved efficiency.
extraction_data.paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models
